shop.message:
🍌 *Banana Shop*

Top up your balance and create without limits!

*Pricing:*
🍌 Standard: 1 banana
⚡ Nano Banana 2: from 2 bananas
💎 PRO: from 4 bananas
📷 Animate photo: 12 bananas

Choose a payment method 👇

prompt.answer_required: Write your answer in one message.
prompt.text_or_image_required: Send a text answer or an image (photo/document).

start.new_user: 👋 Hi! I am Nano Banana Pro 🍌 — your AI photo editor. 🎁 You already got {bonus} bonus {suffix} I am ready to create! Send what to generate or attach 1 to 4 photos to edit.

start.postlink_with_question_intro: 👋 You already got {bonus} bonus {suffix} 🎁 To get a perfect result, answer one question first:

start.ad_settings_applied: ✨ Ad settings applied. 📸 Send a photo to generate.
start.post_prompt_applied: ✨ Post prompt applied. 📸 Send a photo to generate.
menu.examples_title: 📸 Gallery See examples and prompts in our channel.
menu.info_text: 🔥 What AI Image Generator can do: 🖼 Text to Image 📷 AI Edit 🎨 Creative categories ⚡ Fast generation.
menu.help_text: ❓ FAQ: Q: What photos can I send? A: Any. Better quality gives better results. Q: What if I don't like result? A: Rephrase with more details. Q: How to buy generations? A: Use Buy menu. 🆘 Support: {support}

Send *1 to 4 photos* with description, or write what to make.

*Need ideas? 👇*

generation.msg.guide_retry_quality: 👌 Deal — we'll do it right. 1. Send 1–5 sharp selfies (daylight). 2. Then write your request and add face-preservation rules 👆. Waiting for the photo (then the prompt) 👇

Okay, we'll pause the magic 😊

I'm ready to make regular images! Send a prompt or a photo with a caption 👇

generation.msg.ad_scenario_need_photo: 📸 Send your photo to process Settings are applied — just send the photo! 👇 Or tap Cancel to return to the main menu.
generation.msg.cancel_use_buttons_below: ❌ Cancelled Use the buttons below to continue 👇
generation.complaint.instruction: 🎯 How to get a great result and 100% likeness: For your digital twin, you must meet all 3 conditions: 1️⃣ Photo: that's 80% of success. The model draws what it sees. Send a clear face-forward selfie. Good daylight, no harsh shadows, no glasses, face not covered by hair or hands. 2️⃣ Mode: Use PRO. Only PRO transfers facial features with photographic accuracy. Standard is for art and general looks — it won't preserve the face. 3️⃣ Prompt: Add this to your description (tap to copy): Keep identical features: face shape, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone and age. No beauty filters, no beautification, no face morphing. ⚠️ Important: We only guarantee results when all three are followed together! Try again the right way? 👇
generation.smart.need_more: 🎨 Almost enough for a masterpiece! This action costs {cost} 🍌, but you only have {balance} 🍌 left. 👇 Top up to continue:
generation.smart.empty_buy: 🙈 You're out of bananas! Balance is 0. Don't stop now — top up and keep creating! 👇 Top up:
generation.smart.empty_newbie: 🙈 You're out of bananas! You got so creative you ran out — that's fine! 👇 Top up now:
generation.err.security: 🔞 Safety filter triggered! The model won't generate this (adult content, violence, or other restricted topics). 🍌 Try a softer, safer description.
generation.err.validation: 📏 Request too complex or invalid. The text may be too long or settings incompatible. 🍌 Simplify and try again.
generation.err.gemini: 🎨 Couldn't generate from this description. The model got lost in the details. 🍌 Repeating the same prompt won't help. Change the wording (more or less detail) and try again!
generation.err.public_figure: 👤 Request declined: public figure The image or prompt may include a recognizable public person. The provider doesn't allow this. 🍌 Try another photo or rephrase without famous people.
generation.err.kie_reject: 🛑 Generation stopped. The model rejected this request — conflicting details or hidden triggers. 🍌 Please rephrase the prompt.
generation.err.telegram_expired: 🖼 Source image expired! Telegram file links last about an hour. 🍌 Please resend your photo and try again.
generation.err.copyright: 🛑 The model politely declined. Often due to copyrighted characters (Batman, Mickey Mouse, etc.) or a hidden filter. 🍌 Repeating won't help. Use generic descriptions (e.g. “superhero in a black cape”) and try again.
generation.err.server_busy: ⏳ Servers are busy. Too many jobs in the queue. 🍌 Usually clears in a few minutes — try again soon!
generation.err.maintenance: 🛠 Maintenance in progress! We're updating our links to the AI backends. 🍌 Should be back shortly — thanks for your patience.
generation.err.unknown: ⚠️ Something banana-weird happened. Unknown error — we've logged it and are looking into it. 🍌 Try again a bit later.
freebies.text: Want bananas but don't want to pay? 😉 We credit +2 bananas to your balance for every new user who comes from your link and starts using the bot. Invites are unlimited! 10 people = 20 bananas 🔥 👇 Your personal link (tap it to copy): {link} Share it in chats, groups, and stories!
profile.text: 👤 Your profile 🆔 ID: {user_id} 🍌 Balance: {balance} 🎨 Generated: {generated} 👥 Referrals: {ref_count} (+{ref_earn} 🍌) 👇 Account management:
about.text: ℹ️ About Nano Banana Pro Cloud image generation service. 🍌 Bananas are in-app currency for generations. Support: @nan0banana_help
guide.text: 🍌 Guide: How to master Nano Banana Our bot is your personal digital artist. It understands you from half a phrase — if you know how to ask. 🔥 What can the bot do? (3 main modes) 1️⃣ Generation from scratch (Text → Image) 🎨 Describe your idea in words — the bot will draw it. Tip: Don't just write «cat». Write like a director: «Orange cat in a spacesuit on the surface of Mars, cinematic lighting, 4k». 2️⃣ Photoshop with words (Editing) 🛠 Don't like a detail in the photo? Fix it! Send the photo and write: «Remove people from the background», «Change the suit to an evening dress» or «Turn day into night». 3️⃣ Merge and face swap 🎭 Want to be a movie hero or make a collage? • Attach 2 to 4 photos (e.g. your selfie + a beach photo). • Write: «Put me on this beach» or «Make us Santa and Snow Maiden». — — — ⚠️ IMPORTANT: The secret of perfect likeness 💎 Model choice matters! If you need an accurate copy of the face (photorealism) — switch to the PRO model. • Standard — artistic looks, may slightly change facial features. • PRO — keeps maximum portrait similarity. 📸 Photo requirements: ✅ IDEAL PHOTO: • Close-up selfie (face forward). • Daylight (light on the face, no harsh shadows). • No glasses, masks, or hands covering the face. ❌ BAD PHOTO: • Blurry, dark, or blown out. • Face far away or hidden by hair. • Group shot (the bot won't know which person is you). — — — 🏆 Golden rules for your prompt 1️⃣ Forget keyword soup. Don't write: «Girl, pretty, forest». Write in sentences: «A beautiful girl walks through an autumn forest at sunset». 2️⃣ Give context. The bot is smart. Say: «Make a sandwich photo for an upscale menu» — it will add the right light and plate. 3️⃣ Add details. Describe materials («silk dress»), style («cyberpunk», «anime»), and mood. — — — 🚀 Where to get ideas? 🎨 Prompt bank: @nanobanan_promt Browse examples and copy ready descriptions. 👥 Creator community: @nanabanan_chat Share your work, get inspired, find new ideas. 👇 Try it now! Send a photo or text.
notification.admin_balance_credited: 🎁 An administrator credited you with {amount} {suffix}! Happy creating! 🍌
